0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Episodic Memory"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Long-term storage for experiences, conversations, and events. Organized chronologically with rich metadata and hybrid retrieval. Entries are promoted from Working Memory during sleep consolidation."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Schema"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Episodic Memory uses an auto-incrementing ",["$","code",null,{"children":"rowid"}]," with a unique text ",["$","code",null,{"children":"id"}],":"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["|| Column | Type | Description |\n|--------|------|-------------|\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"rowid"}]," | INTEGER | Auto-increment primary key |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"id"}]," | TEXT | UUIDv4 unique identifier |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"content"}]," | TEXT | Full experience record |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source"}]," | TEXT | Origin (user, tool, observation) |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"timestamp"}]," | TEXT | Application-level timestamp |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"session_id"}]," | TEXT | Session grouping key (default: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"'default'"}],") |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"importance"}]," | REAL | 0.0–1.0 importance score (default: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"0.5"}],") |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"metadata_json"}]," | TEXT | Arbitrary JSON metadata blob |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"summary_of"}]," | TEXT | IDs of original Working Memory entries this summarizes |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"created_at"}]," | TIMESTAMP | Row creation time |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recall_count"}]," | INTEGER | Number of times recalled (default: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"0"}],") |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"last_recalled"}]," | TIMESTAMP | Last recall time (default: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"NULL"}],") |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"valid_until"}]," | TIMESTAMP | TTL expiry time |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"superseded_by"}]," | TEXT | ID of newer version |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"scope"}]," | TEXT | Visibility scope (default: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"'global'"}],") |"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Indexes"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"idx_episodic_session"}]," on ",["$","code",null,{"children":"session_id"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"idx_episodic_timestamp"}]," on ",["$","code",null,{"children":"timestamp"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"idx_episodic_source"}]," on ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source"}]]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"FTS5"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Full-text search via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"fts_episodes"}]," (content synced from ",["$","code",null,{"children":"episodic_memory"}],"), maintained by INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE triggers."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Vector Search"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Embeddings stored in ",["$","code",null,{"children":"vec_episodes"}]," (sqlite-vec, int8[384]), generated at recall time."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Hybrid Scoring"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Retrieval combines text and vector signals:"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"score = (vector_similarity * 0.5) + \n      (fts_rank * 0.3) + \n      (temporal_proximity * 0.2)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Signal"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Weight"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Vector similarity"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"0.5"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Semantic closeness to query embedding"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"FTS5 rank"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"0.3"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Full-text match quality via BM25"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Temporal proximity"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"0.2"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Recency of the memory"}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Consolidation Pipeline"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Episodic entries are created during sleep consolidation, not directly by the agent:"}],"\n",["$","$L4",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart TD\n  WM[Working Memory] Working]\n"}],"\n","$L5","\n","$L6","\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb"],["$Lc"],"$Ld"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"z8XDQcUwx1z1UVH0h2I5j"}
5:["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"summary_of"}]," column in the episodic record tracks which Working Memory entries were consolidated to produce it."]}]

7:["$","p",null,{"children":["Episodic entries are grouped by ",["$","code",null,{"children":"session_id"}]," for chronological recall:"]}]
